# FFmpeg.wasm third-party notice

This directory contains browser distributions from:

- `@ffmpeg/ffmpeg` 0.12.15
- `@ffmpeg/core` 0.12.10

Project: https://github.com/ffmpegwasm/ffmpeg.wasm

The wrapper packages are distributed under the MIT license. The compiled core
contains FFmpeg and codec libraries whose applicable licenses are documented by
the upstream project. Keep this notice with the vendored files when redistributing
the application.
